title: hieracium pseudalpinum subsp. pseudoschraderi
intro: Hieracium pseudalpinum subsp. pseudoschraderi, also known as Hieracium pseudoschraderi, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. It is a plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help in reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, Hieracium pseudalpinum subsp. pseudoschraderi is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
